channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Proof of Talk returns to the Louvre with 100+ C-Level speakers representing $18 trillion in AUM
item.description: Proof of Talk, widely known as the Davos of Web3, today confirmed its 2026 programme and opened remaining passes for its fourth edition at the Louvre Palace in Paris on June 2–3.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: South Korea reviews Hana Bank’s Dunamu stake under banking rules: Report
item.description: South Korea’s FSC is reportedly reviewing Hana Bank’s $668 million Dunamu stake under “banking-commerce separation” rules that limit bank ownership tied to crypto firms.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Goldman Sachs exits XRP, Solana ETF exposure in Q1 2026
item.description: Goldman Sachs cut its crypto ETF exposure in Q1 2026, exiting XRP and Solana funds while trimming Bitcoin and Ether ETFs and reshaping equity bets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: AFX launches sovereign Layer 1, providing an optimized execution environment for on-chain perp DEXes
item.description: AFX, a sovereign Layer 1 purpose-built for decentralized derivatives trading, has officially commenced the operation of its L1 Mainnet, signaling a definitive end to the era of trade execution compromised by general-purpose blockchain congestion.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: BTC price ‘bull trap’ at $76.5K? Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin started the week with a dip toward new May lows as ongoing BTC price pressures included "collapsing" US bond markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Capital B boosts Bitcoin reserves with $15.2M purchase
item.description: The 25th-largest Bitcoin treasury company acquired $15 million worth of BTC as one of only four treasury firms to announce a corporate Bitcoin investment during May.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Kraken cuts 150 staff amid AI efficiencies, potentially delaying IPO: Report
item.description: Kraken has cut 150 staff due to the rising use of AI, adding to more than 5,000 layoffs across the crypto sector so far this year, Bloomberg reports.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Verus Ethereum bridge reportedly exploited for $11.6M in latest DeFi attack
item.description: Two security companies have flagged the address where the stolen funds are allegedly being held, showing the cryptocurrencies have been converted into 5,402 Ether.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Surging oil prices have been driving Ether selling pressure: Tom Lee
item.description: Fundstrat's Tom Lee pointed out an inverse correlation between crude and Ether as oil surged back to around $110 on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Reports suggest Iran is mulling Hormuz ‘insurance’ scheme, paid in Bitcoin
item.description: Screenshots of a website called “Hormuz Safe” have been circulating on social media, which offers “digital insurance” for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Senate crypto bill at risk beyond midterms if not passed by August: NYDIG
item.description: NYDIG’s Greg Cipolaro says the Senate’s crypto market structure bill is at risk of failing if it cannot clear a floor vote by August.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Analysts debate whether Bitcoin is in ‘sell in May’ bear market setup
item.description: Some analysts argue that a comparatively broadened, institutionalized buyer base for crypto today may prevent a repeat of the drawdowns seen in May 2018 and May 2022.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: WETH markets return to normal operations on Aave amid rsETH recovery progress
item.description: Aave applied a temporary freeze to WETH as a precautionary safety measure in response to the Kelp DAO exploit, alongside freezes on the rsETH and wrsETH reserves.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Grayscale, VanEck amend US spot BNB ETF filings, stepping closer to potential launch
item.description: The US securities regulator approved 21Shares’ Hyperliquid ETF last week, adding to a growing number of cryptocurrencies converted into ETF wrappers in the US.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Bernstein says Figure's Q1 results shows uniqueness of blockchain marketplaces
item.description: Figure Technology Solutions latest quarterly results showed Bernstein analysts how different it is from most balance sheet-based fintech lending platforms.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Robert Lakin

item.title: Saylor signals BTC buy as retail holders get push on STRC dividend vote
item.description: Michael Saylor signaled another Bitcoin buy on Sunday while urging retail investors to vote on a proxy measure enabling semi-monthly STRC dividend payouts.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Robert Lakin

item.title: SBI, Rakuten, Nomura line up to launch crypto investment trusts: Report
item.description: Japan’s biggest brokerages are racing to bring crypto investment trusts to retail investors, as regulators move to formally allow crypto-holding funds by 2028.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Bitcoin slides below $79K on macro fears: Can fixed-income outflows save it?
item.description: While macro pain and Iran war uncertainty drag Bitcoin below $79K, fixed-income market outflows could trigger a medium-term Bitcoin rebound.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Italy’s largest bank more than doubles crypto holdings to $235M in Q1: Report
item.description: Intesa Sanpaolo increased its crypto holdings from $100 million to $235 million in Q1 2026, making first-time moves into Ethereum and XRP while almost exiting Solana.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Michael Saylor floated Bitcoin sales idea to avoid 'impairing' the asset
item.description: Strategy executive chairman Michael Saylor said that continuing to use the “never sell” Bitcoin mantra could ultimately undermine the very asset his company is built around.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ciaran Lyons

item.title: US CLARITY Act will be a ‘boon for domestic innovation’: A16z
item.description: A16z crypto said that when US legal frameworks strike a balance between innovation and consumer protection, the impact tends to ripple through into global markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ciaran Lyons

item.title: STRC preferred stock investors are mispricing major dislocation risk: Analyst
item.description: Potential liquidity contractions in secondary markets and surging government bond yields could spell trouble for preferred perpetual stockholders.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: Strategy to repurchase $1.5B of 2029 convertible notes
item.description: The notes carry a 0% coupon, but can be converted into equity in the company if holders choose to redeem their notes for shares.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: Bitcoin analysis sees 'bear trap' as BTC price passes two-week lows under $78K
item.description: Bitcoin fell below $78,000 for the first time since the start of May, but traders refused to give up hope of a BTC price rebound coming next.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: OpenAI partners with Malta to give all citizens free ChatGPT Plus access
item.description: In a world-first deal, OpenAI and Malta will give all citizens free ChatGPT Plus for a year after they complete a government-backed AI literacy course.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: THORChain confirms $10M exploit, rolls out recovery portal for affected users
item.description: THORChain has launched a recovery portal following a $10 million exploit, allowing affected users across four chains to revoke malicious approvals and claim refunds.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Sharplink CEO points out 3 catalysts for Ether's price to surge higher
item.description: The rest of the world is closely watching the US CLARITY Act as the nation moves further away from its once “hostile stance,” according to Sharplink CEO Joseph Chalom.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ciaran Lyons

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs bleed $1B in a week, snapping six-week inflow run
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs shed $1 billion in a single week as capital rotated toward AI stocks and macro uncertainty weighed on sentiment, ending a six-week run that had pulled in $3.4 billion.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: US CLARITY Act brings ‘major spike of euphoria’ to Bitcoin: Santiment
item.description: Santiment warned that the crypto market typically moves against crowd expectations, pointing to a recent rise in bullish sentiment driven by renewed momentum around the US CLARITY Act.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ciaran Lyons
